name: OpenToken.Token.List_Mixin

documentation.description:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
 This package defines a generic list token for recursive descent
 parsers. A list is a token that is made up of any number of
 repetitions of other tokens, separated by a given separator token.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

tagged_types.name: Instance
tagged_types.code: type Instance is new Parent_Token with private;

access_types.name: Element_Action
Handle
access_types.code: type Handle is access all Class;

access_types.name: List_Action
access_types.code: type List_Action is access procedure (List : in out Instance);

subprograms.code:
function "*"
  (Token       : in Instance;
   Add_Element : in Element_Action)
  return Handle

function "**"
  (Element   : access Component_Token'Class;
   Separator : access OpenToken.Token.Class)
  return Instance

function "+"
  (Token      : in Handle;
   Initialize : in List_Action)
  return Handle

function "-"
  (Token : in Handle;
   Build : in List_Action)
  return Handle

subprograms.name: Expecting
subprograms.code: procedure Expecting (Token : access Instance; List : in out Linked_List.Instance)

subprograms.name: Get
Image
subprograms.code: function Image (Item : in Instance) return String

subprograms.name: New_Instance
Parse
Set_Lookahead
subprograms.code: procedure Set_Lookahead (Token : in out Instance; Lookahead : in Integer)

formals.name: Component_Token
formals.code: type Component_Token is abstract new OpenToken.Token.Instance with private;

formals.name: Parent_Token
formals.code: type Parent_Token is abstract new OpenToken.Token.Instance with private;
